notification.checkpointDelayedBody: {fileName} — Changes stay local and will retry automatically
notification.diagnosticsCopiedBody: Paste it into your support request when needed.
notification.finalizeDelayedPreserved: Your local copy stays preserved and finalize will retry
notification.finalizeDelayedResumed: Finalize will resume on next retry
notification.recoveryResetBody: stella desktop reset its local recovery state after a storage error. Reopen any draft from stella if needed.
notification.revisionCreatedBody: {fileName} saved as version {versionNumber}. Desktop editing finished
notification.sessionClosedUnsaved: {fileName} — You have unsaved local edits. Find your copy in Temporary working copies.
notification.sessionClosedSaved: {fileName} — Local copy stays preserved in Temporary working copies
notification.takenOverBody: {fileName} — Reopen from stella here to take editing back
notification.takenOverLocalError: Desktop editing moved to another device. This local copy is preserved.

settings.errorRevealAppData: stella desktop could not reveal app data.
settings.errorUpdatePreferences: stella desktop could not update notification settings.

settings.notificationRevisionCreatedDescription: A clean stella revision was created after finishing.
